name: AREthTriggerEvent
title: AREthTriggerEvent
description: This function triggers sending of an Event.

Afterwards, the CAPL callback function is called in <OnAREthPrepareEvent>, and the application has the opportunity to change or update the values of the SOME/IP Event before it is sent to its subscriber and by Multicast.

parameters.name: pevHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the Event that is to be sent. The handle must have been created beforehand with AREthAddEvent.
